name: ai_marketing_claude
description: A multifunctional AI marketing assistant integrating 15 specialized marketing skills via parallel subagents to audit websites, generate marketing copy, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence insights, and produce client-ready PDF reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to be audited or analyzed.

inputs.name: business_info
inputs.description: Details about the business or product for which marketing content is to be generated.

inputs.name: marketing_goals
inputs.description: Specific marketing objectives like lead generation, brand awareness, or sales conversion.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Description of the intended audience or customer demographics.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Settings and constraints for email sequences, ad campaigns, or content calendars (e.g., timeline, platform, budget).

inputs.name: competitive_data
inputs.description: Relevant data or URLs for competitors used for intelligence gathering.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive audit of the provided website including strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated marketing text such as taglines, ad copies, blog posts, or social media posts.

outputs.name: email_sequence
outputs.description: Automatically created sequence of marketing emails aimed at engagement and conversion.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plan
outputs.description: Strategy and suggested content for ad campaigns tailored to the marketing goals.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: Scheduled plan for publishing marketing content over a defined period.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Analytical report comparing competitor data and insights to inform marketing strategy.

outputs.name: client_ready_report
outputs.description: Consolidated, well-formatted marketing report suitable for presentation to clients.

steps: Receive input parameters including website URL, business information, marketing goals, and target audience.
Parallelize subagents to conduct specific marketing tasks like website audit, copywriting, and competitive analysis.
Aggregate outputs from each subagent including text content and analytical data.
Generate structured marketing assets such as email sequences, ad campaigns, and content calendars.
Compile findings and generated content into client-ready PDF reports.
Deliver compiled reports and generated marketing materials to the user.
use_cases: Marketing teams looking to automate website audits and receive actionable recommendations.
Businesses needing AI-generated marketing copy and email sequences for campaigns.
Agencies preparing competitive intelligence and client-ready marketing reports quickly.
Content managers requiring content calendars generated based on marketing strategies.
Advertisers wanting AI-assisted ad campaign planning and execution support.
patterns: Parallel subagent orchestration for simultaneous execution of multiple marketing tasks
Automated website auditing techniques leveraging AI analysis
Dynamic content generation driven by input marketing goals and business context
Template-based email and campaign sequence creation
Content calendar generation based on strategic marketing timelines
Competitive intelligence aggregation and comparative reporting
Generation of client-ready PDF documents consolidating AI outputs

prompt_templates.name: website_audit
prompt_templates.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and provide a detailed marketing analysis with recommendations.

prompt_templates.name: generate_marketing_copy
prompt_templates.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy for a business described as: {business_info} targeting {target_audience} with goals {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: create_email_sequence
prompt_templates.template: Create an email sequence for a campaign with parameters: {campaign_parameters} aimed at {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: plan_ad_campaign
prompt_templates.template: Design an ad campaign strategy based on the business: {business_info}, targeting {target_audience} with goals: {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: generate_content_calendar
prompt_templates.template: Generate a content calendar for marketing activities over the period defined in {campaign_parameters}.

prompt_templates.name: competitive_intelligence
prompt_templates.template: Analyze competitor data from: {competitive_data} and provide a comparative intelligence report.

prompt_templates.name: compile_client_report
prompt_templates.template: Compile all marketing findings and generated materials into a professional client-ready PDF report.
